name: GSD Auto
description: A durable milestone workflow that discovers incomplete delivery phases, iterates them, verifies work, audits coverage, and archives completion state.

payload.title: Discuss and plan
payload.summary: Establish scope, risks, and implementation path.

payload.title: Verify and polish
payload.summary: Run checks, close gaps, and prepare the milestone audit.

nodes.title: Human verification
nodes.description: Pause the Workflow for user judgment before continuing.
nodes.prompt: Review the current artifacts and choose how the Workflow should continue.

nodes.title: Audit decision
nodes.description: Pause the Workflow for user judgment before continuing.
nodes.prompt: Review the current artifacts and choose how the Workflow should continue.

nodes.title: Next milestone
nodes.description: Pause the Workflow for user judgment before continuing.
nodes.prompt: Review the current artifacts and choose how the Workflow should continue.
